locations.name: 加萊拉港
locations.summary: 加萊拉港（英語：Puerto Galera），位於菲律賓東民都洛省最西北方的一個地區，距離首府馬尼拉大約130公里（81英里），以旅遊業最為出名，當地的沙璜灣（Sabang Bay）自1973年已被聯合國教科文組織列為人與生物圈保護區（M…

locations.name: Mount Halcon
locations.summary: Mount Halcon (Filipino: Bundok Halcon) and (Spanish: Monte Halcón) is the highest mountain in Mindoro.

locations.name: Mounts Iglit–Baco Natural Park
locations.summary: The Mounts Iglit–Baco Natural Park (MIBNP) is a legislated protected area of the Philippines and an ASEAN Heritage Park…

locations.name: Mount Calavite
locations.summary: Mount Calavite is a peak located in the island of Mindoro in the Philippines.

relations.subject: Mindoro cuckooshrike
relations.evidence: Dynamite blasting for marble is an additional threat to forest at Puerto Galera Occurs in a few protected areas in the Dubduban Watershed in Tablas, Mount Halcon, Mounts Iglit–Baco Natural Park, Mount Calavite and the Siburan Forest Reserve but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax

relations.subject: Mindoro cuckooshrike
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lownland and montane forests up to 2,000 meters above sea level
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Mindoro cuckooshrike
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, and conversion into farmlands through Slash-and-burn and other methods.The species does not occur at high density even within the little remaining forest cover on Tablas
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
